prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MARKINGRIBBON-PARENT Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 200ft High Visibility Trail Marking Ribbon, Backpacking Safety Hiking Gear in Assorted Colors Description: Mark your camp ground, construction site, or hiking path easily with the ASR Outdoor High Visibility Marking Ribbon.

The ASR Outdoor High Visibility Marking Ribbon is great for sectioning off or marking sites. Each roll of ribbon features a super bright color and has 200 feet.

This ribbon is constructed of durable, weather-proof PVC so you can count on it rain or shine. The ribbon is just .06mm thick, and comes in 6 bright colors: orange, neon green, yellow, neon yellow, pink or red.

Make sure to grab a roll or 2 of this tape before your next camping trip, construction job or team sport event. Search Terms: marking hunter flag non adhesive boundary marker ribbon nylon bright high visibility tree line tagging tape surveyor land trust trail search rescue vinyl film roll Features: - Trail Marking Ribbon Length: 200 feet; Width: 1 inch - High visibility bright color marker - Trail Marking Ribbon Thickness: 0.06mm - Colors Available: Orange, Neon Green, Neon Yellow, Yellow, Red or Pink - Material: Weather resistant PVC nylon === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 200ft High Visibility Trail Marking Ribbon

anthropic.title_differentiation: 200 Feet, 1 Inch Wide, Weather Resistant PVC, 6 Bright Colors, Non-Adhesive Boundary Marker

openai.title_differentiation: High Visibility, Weather Resistant PVC, 1 Inch Wide, 006Mm Thick, 6 Colors, For Camping And Safety
